/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -g -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=flight_controller.map -T/home/eagle/programming/github_projects/quadcopter/flight_controller/STM32F411XX_FLASH.ld CMakeFiles/flight_controller.dir/Core/Src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/flight_controller.dir/Core/Src/sysmem.c.obj CMakeFiles/flight_controller.dir/Core/Src/syscalls.c.obj CMakeFiles/flight_controller.dir/startup_stm32f411xe.s.obj
